task_objective: Text-to-Nail Art Generation with Line Art

line_art_reference.description: Preserve nail shape, outline, and structural framework from line art

workflow.step_1_line_art_analysis: Parse line art elements with strict precision, including nail shape, outline, structural framework, and edge details.
workflow.step_2_composite_generation: No text, Straight-on front view, macro nail photography. Apply design elements from press_on_nail_prompt (4 distinct prompts) onto the nail surface defined by the line art. Generate 4 unique nail art designs based on the 4 prompts, each in a 2x2 grid. Each design must fit naturally within the line art framework with seamless integration, no visible artifacts, and physically accurate material properties. Reveal nail art's overall design and fine details (color application, pattern continuity, decorative element placement). Preserve the complete structural integrity from the line art — nail shape and outline remain untouched.
